column1: Remote Realms – Farming Data (Plant + Harvest XP)

Sources: Remote Realms Wiki (Fandom) Farming page + personal in-game testing notes.
Scope: Planting and Harvesting XP only (watering and fertilizer/compost XP are excluded from calculator outputs).
*Growth times are based on watering can application on 1st planting and consistent casting of Rain Dance

column4: Planting XP per full run (40 plots × 85 XP)

column5: Watermelon used as compost agent, producing grade 10–12 compost (highest currently available)
Use expected yield = 5 per plot. If yield is higher, bonus XP is treated as a happy surprise.

column4: Compost in Remote Realms is made by processing organic materials and can be used on farming plots to increase crop yields;
higher level produce makes higher grade compost that often results in larger harvests.
Because compost affects yield variability rather than base XP values,
it is not included in the calculator’s core calculations but is noted here for context.
